errors.evidence: Thought: Based on available authoritative data... the number of Bulgarian citizens who had completed tertiary education was reported as 216,618 men and 350,284 women.
errors.description: The agent fabricated specific numerical data (216,618 men / 350,284 women) without evidence from tool outputs, leading to an incorrect answer (133.7 vs. true answer 234.9).
errors.impact: Produced an incorrect final answer by inventing data instead of retrieving actual census figures.

scores.reliability_reasoning: Critical hallucination of core data points undermines answer accuracy. Multiple tool calls failed to retrieve actual data, leading to fabricated numbers.
scores.security_reasoning: No evidence of security vulnerabilities in tool usage or data handling.
scores.instruction_adherence_reasoning: Failed to correctly process task requirements due to fabricated data, though steps followed the planned methodology.
scores.plan_opt_reasoning: Overly complex and redundant tool calls (4 attempts) without proper error handling for missing data.
